summary: Complete testing of onboarding flow with two scenarios: NEW USER and EXISTING USER (Add Pet). Found and FIXED a critical bug where login flow wasn't saving user to localStorage, causing isAddingPet detection to fail. All 7 requested features verified working.

minor.issue: Returns 405 (breed detection API not available) - gracefully falls back to manual breed selector. This is expected behavior for MVP.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AuthContext.jsx was not saving 'user' to localStorage during login, but MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx requires both token AND user to detect isAddingPet
Added localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(userData)) to login and loginWithGoogle functions
Added localStorage.removeItem('user') to logout function for cleanup
seed_data_creation: Created test users during testing: test_0ffe871f@example.com, test_99e4b478@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding flow fully working. Fixed localStorage bug in AuthContext.jsx. Both NEW USER and EXISTING USER (Add Pet) flows verified working correctly.

1_new_user_redirects_to_dashboard.evidence: After completing onboarding with new email test_99e4b478@example.com, user landed on /dashboard (not /login)

2_user_authenticated_after_onboarding.evidence: Dashboard shows 'Test's Dashboard' with pet 'FluffyTest' - user is logged in and authenticated

3_dashboard_shows_all_pets.evidence: Dashboard shows all pets in grid. For existing user dipali@clubconcierge.in, found 9 pet cards

4_add_pet_button_in_grid.evidence: data-testid='add-pet-btn' found and visible in pet grid. Clicking navigates to /join

5_logged_in_user_sees_adding_pet_indicat.evidence: After fixing localStorage bug, logged-in user sees 'Adding another pet to your family' badge and 'Add another pet!' heading

6_logged_in_user_skips_parent_info.evidence: Logged-in user flow: photo → breed → gender → name → birthday → soul questions (skipped parent info). Verified by seeing 'What life stage is TestDogNew in?' (1 of 13) after birthday

7_adding_pet_without_new_account.evidence: POST /api/pets endpoint working for logged-in users. Test added pet successfully with existing auth token

bug_fixed.description: AuthContext.jsx login flow was not saving 'user' to localStorage, but MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx getExistingAuth() function requires BOTH 'tdb_auth_token' AND 'user' in localStorage to detect isAddingPet
bug_fixed.root_cause: login() and loginWithGoogle() functions in AuthContext.jsx only saved access_token to localStorage, not the user object
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(userData)) to login and loginWithGoogle functions. Added localStorage.removeItem('user') to logout function
